title: Travel illness return review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

presenting_history.text: Supports itinerary, subnational destination, dates, travel style, accommodation, bites, animals, freshwater, food, water, sexual and fellow-traveler illness history without assigning an infection.
presenting_history.rationale: Relevant to entered itinerary and exposure history without assigning an infection.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Supports itinerary, subnational destination, dates, travel style, accommodation, bites, animals, freshwater, food, water, sexual and fellow-traveler illness history without assigning an infection.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler

exact_section.heading: The post-travel evaluation — association with travel and exposures
exact_section.locator: official chapter sections “Association of the traveler’s illness with (recent) travel” and “Exposures”

red_flags.text: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded initial severity and infection-control context without classifying urgency.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler

exact_section.heading: Introduction and triage of the ill returned traveler

investigations.text: Supports clinician recording of underlying conditions, medicines, vaccination, prophylaxis, symptom syndrome, onset relative to travel and incubation context without generating tests or a diagnosis.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to clinician assessment of host, syndrome and incubation context without generating a differential or test panel.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician recording of underlying conditions, medicines, vaccination, prophylaxis, symptom syndrome, onset relative to travel and incubation context without generating tests or a diagnosis.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler

exact_section.heading: Clinical evaluation — host factors, syndromic approach and incubation context
exact_section.locator: official chapter clinical-evaluation and incubation-period sections

sources_used.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE communicable-disease and referral adaptation

additions.text: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.
additions.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded initial severity and infection-control context without classifying urgency.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Itinerary, dates, onset, syndrome, exposures, host factors, vaccination, prophylaxis and observations are absent.
No travel-related diagnosis, risk, test, isolation, notification, treatment, referral or urgency is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
